ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the budget belongs to */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is allocated for */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was allocated */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_types" (
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure type */,
  "expenditure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure type */,
  "parent_expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent expenditure type (for hierarchical expenditure types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the transaction belongs to */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor involved in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expenditure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type_id") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_reimbursements" (
  "reimbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reimbursement */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reimbursed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reimbursement */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the reimbursement */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the travel */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reimbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_reimbursements_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement" (
  "procurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement transaction */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the procurement belongs to */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor involved in the procurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the procurement */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the procurement */,
  "item_purchased" TEXT /* Item purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the transaction */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the changes */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, accountant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "budget_allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget the allocation belongs to */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure type */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the expenditure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_expenditure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type_id") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_limits" (
  "expenditure_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure limit */,
  "expenditure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure type */,
  "limit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the limit */,
  "limit_description" TEXT /* Description of the limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_limits_expenditure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_type_id") REFERENCES expenditure_types ("expenditure_type_id")
)
